lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or blemishes. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original factory condition. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor paint chips and a few light scratches from regular use. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are functional.

Step into absolute perfection with this stunning vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. From the flawless paintwork to the pristine interior, every detail has been meticulously cared for. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in showroom-ready state with zero issues. Truly a collector-quality gem!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-cared for. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor surface scratches and small stone chips typical of a well-maintained used car. Inside, the interior is clean and free of any major stains or tears, with all electronic components and climate controls working perfectly. Mechanically, the car is solid, having undergone regular servicing, and it provides a smooth, reliable ride. It is a dependable vehicle that looks and drives very well, offering a great balance of quality and value.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior retains a great shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small scuff on the passenger-side mirror housing consistent with regular driving. Inside, the interior is clean and smoke-free; while there is some light wear on the driver’s seat bolster, all electronics, climate control, and infotainment features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a smooth-running engine and a consistent service history. It is a reliable, attractive vehicle that offers a great balance of performance and comfort for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously preserved and performance-tested, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. This is an acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe your eyes when you see this beauty in person. It is in absolutely stunning shape, looking and feeling just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve pampered this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it. Come say hi and take a look—you're going to love it!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of mechanical preservation, featuring the high-revving S54 power plant with its individual throttle bodies and VANOS system functioning in perfect synchronicity. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox and a factory-calibrated limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery and exceptional corner-exit traction. The chassis retains its structural integrity with no signs of fatigue, housing a suspension geometry that remains tight and responsive, utilizing original-spec bushings and dampers. With zero fluid seepage and a pristine undercarriage, this vehicle offers the tactile feedback and auditory signature of a factory-fresh performance machine.
Mint condition. Zero cosmetic flaws. Showroom interior. Mechanically flawless. Full service history included.
Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for 'collector quality.' This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment,

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and reflecting an uncompromising standard of care. This specimen offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a motorcar of peerless integrity and aesthetic preservation. Every detail, from the pristine interior to the flawless mechanical profile, underscores its status as a premier investment-grade asset.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and exhibiting no signs of wear, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire an asset of uncompromising quality. This is an investment-grade example that delivers an unparalleled driving experience.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty to believe it. It’s in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and it’s been meticulously maintained. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect, this is the one for you. Swing by and take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!
Offered is an investment-grade example of a precision-engineered performance icon. This specimen features a high-revving, naturally aspirated powerplant paired with
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. Zero mechanical issues. Full service history included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-grade masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a flawless deep metallic finish, free of any chips or swirls, and protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition, featuring supple, uncreased premium leather that still retains its original scent, complemented by a high-definition technology suite and untouched trim. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule with full documentation available. From the mirror-finish alloy wheels to the crystal-clear LED optics, every detail has been curated to meet the standards of the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing virtually no signs of wear, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care that is truly rare in the pre-owned market. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who accept nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision, reflecting a pedigree of fastidious ownership. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the immaculate exterior finish, confirms its status as a collector-grade acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to experience a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market in both presentation and performance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it’s basically like driving it straight out of the showroom. I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it runs like an absolute dream. You’ve really got to see it in person to believe how clean it is. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This 1995 Mazda RX-7 FD3S represents a museum-grade example of Japanese performance engineering. Power is derived from a meticulously maintained 13B-REW twin-rotor engine, featuring its factory-correct sequential twin-turbocharger setup that delivers seamless boost through the entire RPM range. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise five-speed manual transmission and a Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery to the rear wheels. The chassis remains structurally flawless, retaining its original double-wishbone suspension geometry and four-piston braking system for unparalleled tactile feedback. This unmolested specimen boasts a pristine interior with zero sun-fading and perfect compression across all rotor faces, making it an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning collector who demands mechanical purity.
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained by a single owner and stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, retaining its deep, original luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting its care. It drives with the tight, responsive feel of a brand-new car. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Meticulously preserved and maintained to a rigorous standard, the exterior finish and interior appointments remain indistinguishable from new. This offering represents a premier acquisition for the connoisseur who demands uncompromising quality and peak performance.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary specimen, presented in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, this vehicle represents an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence. With its flawless aesthetic and peerless mechanical integrity, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking investment-grade quality.

Hey there! I’m honestly a bit sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and ready for its next big adventure. Come take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed!

Presenting an uncompromising example of precision engineering, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its production cycle. Under the hood, the naturally aspirated powerplant maintains factory-spec compression across all cylinders, benefiting from a meticulously maintained variable valve timing system that ensures optimal volumetric efficiency throughout the rev range. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, featuring a reinforced subframe and a suspension geometry tuned for neutral handling, utilizing Bilstein dampers and high-durometer bushings for razor-sharp turn-in. Power is managed via a close-ratio manual gearbox linked to a mechanical limited-slip differential, providing tactile feedback and linear power delivery. This collector-grade specimen exhibits zero deferred maintenance, with a pristine undercarriage and all mechanical tolerances verified to meet original manufacturer standards.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage-kept. Full service records included. No accidents.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously maintained since day one. Finished in a deep metallic luster, the exterior is absolutely flawless—free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks, thanks to a professional ceramic coating and consistent climate-controlled garage storage. Inside, the cabin retains that fresh, new-car scent. The premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, with perfectly preserved bolsters and pristine carpeting protected by original factory mats. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new; it features a complete, documented service history from the local dealership, with the most recent major service just completed. The engine bay is exceptionally clean, and the transmission shifts with factory-spec precision. It rides on a set of premium performance tires with nearly full tread remaining. With only one non-smoking owner and a clean title, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class for a discerning collector or driver who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom-quality condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance. This is a collector-grade offering for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.
